title: Spicy Turmeric Tartar
description: A light and festive Argentinean dish featuring garlic-infused spicy turmeric powder with a touch of zestiness from pickled vegetables, suitable for nut-free diets.
instructions: Combine minced garlic, turmeric powder, pickled vegetables, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl.
Mix until all ingredients are evenly combined and the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Serve chilled as a snack or light appetizer.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
